BoJ Hawkish Divergence (rate hike 2-3x in 2026 expected): JPY structurally supported; April hike on table; rate differential narrowing vs USD
ECB Hawkish Shift (energy shock driving rate-hike bets): EUR-USD rate differential widening vs prior dovish ECB stance; Morgan Stanley no longer expects ECB cuts
